chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1160 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.6425/2025 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of CMA No. 5963/2025 4. For hearing of main case 15.04.2025 Mr. Faizan Hussain Memon, advocate for respondent Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Syed Qamar-uz-Zaman Shah, Assistant Director Legal SPPRA. Mr. Altamash Arab advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of petitioner which is taken on record. Under instructions he states that the appeal shall be filed before the Review Committee constituted under Rule 32 of the SPPRA Rules 2010, and seeks that the same be determined in accordance with law after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner within the prescribed timeframe. Syed Qamar-uz-Zaman Shah, Assistant Director Legal SPPRA is present and states that the respondent has no cavil to the aforesaid and the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
